title: RESEARCH_TRAJECTORY_V1
description: Cluster of experiments sharing a mutation_family, with an aggregate performance trend. Produced deterministically from the Experiment Lineage Graph. Non-sovereign — authority=NONE. Drives the Experiment Selection Policy.

performance_trend.description: IMPROVING = admitted_rate >= threshold. DECLINING = no admissions. PLATEAU = mixed.

confidence.description: admitted_count / experiment_count. Measure of trend reliability.

linked_skills.description: Skill IDs admitted through experiments in this trajectory.

status.description: ACTIVE = still worth exploring. EXHAUSTED = declining returns. ABANDONED = dead zone.

authority.description: Trajectories are analysis artifacts. They carry zero institutional authority.
